info.title: pub2arc
info.description: CLI tool to create ARC-scaffolds from publications.

options.name: --bibtexpath
options.description:
file path to a BibTex file with one or more
publication references

options.name: --doilistpath
options.description:
file path to text file with one or more DOIs (one per
line)

options.name: --arccollectiondir
options.description: directory path to collect the created ARCs

options.name: --addreadme
options.description: whether to add a default README.md to the ARC
